mode_interpretation.case_only_exploratory: applies the case-level 15% release rule to every audited domain; strict_external result is frozen display only
mode_interpretation.shift_aware_deployable: applies the release rule only when the batch hard_shift_gate is not severe_unknown_shift; severe unknown shift falls back to v195

tie_handling: sort by model_disagreement_rate ascending, then dino_fn_risk_max ascending, then case_id ascending for deterministic residual ties
selection_basis: negative audits for fixed thresholds and veto variants
known_limitations: strict_external has only 60 candidate automatic decisions, so zero errors still gives Wilson95 upper about 6.02%
strict_external release benefit is concentrated in AB cases
loosening to 20% is unsafe in third_batch fold-level boundary audit
fixed global model_disagreement_rate thresholds are unsafe on third_batch
case_id is used only as the final deterministic residual tie-break, not as a risk signal
dino_fn_risk_max is now materialized in stable_policy_features.csv, but the upstream generator still derives it from the v191 experimental artifact
266/699 cases have missing dino_fn_risk_max, but no currently released case has missing dino_fn_risk_max
next_audit_priorities: manual review of candidate_casebook_cases.csv released and near_boundary_reviewed rows
lock operational batch definition before implementation in production code
promote dino_fn_risk_max from historical artifact to stable feature interface if this candidate is implemented
